summary: Excellent high‑fidelity release that matches the official Vault version, offering a top‑notch listening experience.
review: The recording is praised as being indistinguishable from the Vault version found in the 30 Trips Around the Sun box set, indicating superb audio quality. While no specific songs are highlighted, the reviewer’s enthusiastic comparison suggests the performance itself meets the high standards of that celebrated release.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single review was provided, but it gives a perfect five‑star rating and lauds the recording as equal to an official Vault release, implying both excellent performance and technical quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer states the audio is as good as the Vault version; no flaws or noise are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific commentary on set structure; overall performance regarded as high‑quality by comparison to a celebrated release.
